underlying_goal: Get the SetPieceTakers data pipeline (n8n → Supabase → Next.js site) fully working with all leagues and categories displaying correctly
friction_detail: Claude made false assumptions about data being present without checking, then needed multiple iterations to fix the n8n Parse CSV node (runOnceForEachItem vs runOnceForAllItems, pairedItem issues, upsert timeouts).
brief_summary: User needed the full n8n-to-Supabase-to-site pipeline working for all 27 league/category combos; after several debugging iterations fixing CSV parsing, upsert timeouts, and caching issues, data was populated but site cache still needed clearing.
